title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_push
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_push' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

remote.description: Remote to push to. Defaults to the remote inferred from the current upstream tracking ref, or `origin` when `setUpstream` is true.

branch.description: Branch to push. Defaults to the currently checked-out branch. Rejected when HEAD is detached.

setUpstream.description: Set the upstream tracking reference (`git push -u`). Use when the branch has not been pushed yet. Remote defaults to `origin`.
